findings.description: s4 section content contains four handler names that are absent from the hints array: `thread_context_clear_handler` (appears in handler list and both minimum-configuration tables), `duplicate_process_check_handler` (appears in the process-control handler list), `message_resend_handler` (appears in the messaging handler list and the 応答不要 exclusion note), and `ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler` (appears in the その他 handler list).
findings.source_evidence: Source lists all four under 「MOMメッセージングで使用するハンドラ」: `thread_context_clear_handler` and `ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler` in the その他 group; `duplicate_process_check_handler` in the プロセス実行制御 group; `message_resend_handler` in the メッセージング関連 group. `thread_context_clear_handler` also appears as No. 8 in both minimum-handler tables.
